data.content:
Done. Use the `--framework` flag:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The build succeeded targeting only net9.0. However, no tests were discovered in the assembly — the project may be missing test method attributes or a test adapter package reference (e.g., `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk`, `xunit.runner.visualstudio`, etc.).
